(DEVICE FILE: LAN_PORT_1_RJ45_HRK1_HRK1-1B71P)

PACKAGE RJ45_HRK1
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 20

PINORDER 'LAN_PORT_1_RJ45_HRK1_HRK1-1B71P' 'GRN+' 'GRN-' NC1 NC2 NC3 NC4 NC5 NC6 'RD+' 'RD-' S1 S2,
      'TD+' 'TD-' VC1 VC2 VC3 VC4 'YLW+' 'YLW-'
PINUSE 'LAN_PORT_1_RJ45_HRK1_HRK1-1B71P' UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC,
      UNSPEC UNSPEC POWER POWER UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC
FUNCTION G1 'LAN_PORT_1_RJ45_HRK1_HRK1-1B71P' 15 16 7 8 9 10 4 5 3 6 S1 S2 1 2 11 12 13 14 17 18

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME LAN_PORT_1
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'HRK1-1B71PG39-36A1B8-1R'

END
